name: Jalapeno Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 Large potatoes, peeled and cut into 3/4 inch cubes
1/4 cup Small bunch scallions, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a 3-quart saucepan or Dutch oven and pour in cold water to cover. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Drain.
2. In a large bowl, combine mustard, vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper. Slowly whisk in oil.
3. Add potatoes, olives, scallions, feta cheese, and peppers. Toss to mix well.
4. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
